Operation 'getFeaturedGifs' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details. Summary is clear and appropriate. Description lacks detail about pagination support and parameter options that would help AI agents understand available filtering capabilities. Added context about pagination and locale filtering to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns a list of the current global featured GIFs. Tenor updates the featured stream regularly throughout the day.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a list of the current global featured GIFs curated by Tenor. The featured stream is updated regularly throughout the day. Supports pagination and locale-specific content filtering through optional parameters.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and appropriate. Description lacks detail about pagination support and parameter options that would help AI agents understand available filtering capabilities. Added context about pagination and locale filtering to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getCategories' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details. Summary is clear. Description mentions 'provided type' but doesn't clarify that this is a required parameter or explain what type values are valid. Enhanced description to clarify the type parameter requirement and additional filtering capabilities for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns a list of GIF categories associated with the provided type. Each category includes a representative GIF.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a list of GIF categories filtered by the specified type parameter. Each category object includes metadata and a representative GIF. Supports locale-specific category names and filtering by content type.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description mentions 'provided type' but doesn't clarify that this is a required parameter or explain what type values are valid. Enhanced description to clarify the type parameter requirement and additional filtering capabilities for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getSearchSuggestions' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate but generic. Description is too minimal - it doesn't explain the ranking behavior, use case, or output format. Enhanced description to clarify relevancy ranking, use case context, and that results are string-based for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Returns a list of alternative search terms related to the given search term.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a list of alternative search terms semantically related to the provided search term. Results are ranked by relevancy to help users discover related content. Useful for search refinement and discovery workflows.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but generic. Description is too minimal - it doesn't explain the ranking behavior, use case, or output format. Enhanced description to clarify relevancy ranking, use case context, and that results are string-based for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'registerShare' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary 'Register a GIF share' is vague about the tracking/analytics purpose. Description lacks clarity about required inputs (GIF ID, user identifier), output (likely no direct return), and side effects (share count increment, ranking impact). Enhanced summary to emphasize tracking purpose and description to clarify inputs, outputs, and side effects for better AI agent understanding of this analytics operation.

data.current_description: Register that a user shared a GIF or sticker. This improves search result ranking for the shared content.
data.description_suggestion: Records that a user shared a specific GIF or sticker, enabling Tenor to track share metrics and improve search result ranking for popular content. Requires the GIF ID and user identifier as input parameters. This operation has no direct return value but triggers backend analytics processing. Side effect: Increments share count for the GIF and may influence its ranking in future search results.
data.reasoning: Summary 'Register a GIF share' is vague about the tracking/analytics purpose. Description lacks clarity about required inputs (GIF ID, user identifier), output (likely no direct return), and side effects (share count increment, ranking impact). Enhanced summary to emphasize tracking purpose and description to clarify inputs, outputs, and side effects for better AI agent understanding of this analytics operation.
